purpose_context: The 4-run identity-boundary canary protocol that closed e2e#41 currently runs only on demand, locally. The next PR to spec-kitty, spec-kitty-saas, or spec-kitty-events could silently break it. This mission pins the canary's enforcement into CI as a required check on each of those three repos, plus documents the human admin action needed to make the checks branch-protection-required.
purpose_tldr: Make the identity-boundary canary a required CI check across three repos so regressions break the build, not production.
